'''Keoulkeech''' was an [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Shaman/Legends|shaman]] and the older brother of [[Leektar/Legends|Leektar]].<ref name="Leektar DB" />

==Biography==
Growing up in [[Red Bush Grove]], Keoulkeech surpassed Leektar in many areas, including healing and animal bonding. Leektar grew jealous of Keoulkeech and prayed to the [[Leaf Queen]] to gain greater status within his tribe; this resulted in an electrical fire spreading across Red Bush Grove, killing all but Leektar and Keoulkeech, though neither of them knew the other was alive.<ref name="Leektar DB" /> Keoulkeech fought in Chief [[Chirpa/Legends|Chirpa's]] attack group during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].<ref name="H&R" />

[[File:Keoulkeech-Star_Wars_94.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Keoulkeech prepares for war]]
After the defeat of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], Keoulkeech was involved in the brief conflict between the Ewoks and their fellow [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] allies, the [[Lahsbee/Huhk|Lahsbees]], which developed at the instigation of the [[Hiromi]] known as [[Hirog]]. Keoulkeech donned an Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] helmet and belt to prepare for the war that never came.<ref name="MC 94">[[Star Wars (1977) 94|''Star Wars'' (1977) 94]]</ref><ref name="Hasbro">{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: The Legacy Collection|packtype=''Star Wars'' Comic Pack|pack=Machook, Keoulkeech & Kettch (Marvel's ''Star Wars'' #94)|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/TLCcomicpacksWM093.asp}}</ref>

Following the conflicts on Endor, Keoulkeech began working to cure the forest of its pain. It was during this time that he discovered that he could communicate with the Great Trees of the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon]], telling him which of them needed aid.<ref name="H&R" /> Keoulkeech was soon reunited with his younger brother Leektar, who had become an Honorary Elder in [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]].<ref name="Leektar DB" /> However, this reunion was not to last. After his healing mission was completed, Keoulkeech visited [[Salfur's Trading Post]], where he saw a [[Carosite]] medical transport laden with supplies bound for [[Yir Tangee/Legends|Yir Tangee]]. Keoulkeech realized that his healing talents were needed beyond just the forest, and departed with it. He became a passenger aboard the Carosite medical frigate ''[[Sudden Restoration]]'', bringing medical service to worlds ravaged by the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He also became an associate of the [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] musician [[Ballifore Figg]] and the [[Bimm/Legends|Bimm]] bard [[Vasnish Kay]].<ref name="H&R" />

Keoulkeech was named for a [[Keoulkeech (legend)|warrior and hunter]] from Ewok mythology.<ref name="GCG">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Keoulkeech_Hasbro.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Hasbro's Keoulkeech action figure]]
Keoulkeech was first mentioned in the roleplaying game supplement ''[[Heroes & Rogues]]''. The book mentions his involvement in the Battle of Endor, but no Ewok in {{Film|VI}} has been identified as that character.

Keoulkeech received his first [[Hasbro]] action figure in 2008, as part of an Ewok three-pack including [[Machook]] and [[Kettch (Endor)|Kettch]]. The packaging of which suggests an Ewok named Keoulkeech participated in a conflict with the Lahsbees after the Battle of Endor,<ref name="Hasbro" /> as seen in [[Marvel Comics]]' [[Star Wars (1977) 94|''Star Wars'' 94]]. The ''San Diego Comic Con (SDCC) 2008: Hasbro Star Wars presentation'' announcing future figures to be released initially identified Keoulkeech as a dark-furred Ewok wearing a red hood; however, Keoulkeech was later released as a tan-colored Ewok wearing a purple hood, the Ewok initially identified as Machook.<ref name="SDCC2008a">{{Rebelscum|url=SDCC08/Hasbro/presentation/default.asp|text=San Diago Comic Con (SDCC) 2008: Hasbro Star Wars presentation}}</ref><ref name="SDCC2008b">{{Rebelscum|url=SDCC08/Hasbro/presentation/image53.asp|text=San Diago Comic Con (SDCC) 2008: Hasbro Star Wars presentation (Marvel #94: Keoulkeech, Machook, Kettch)}}</ref> An unidentified light-furred Ewok wearing stormtrooper armor seen in the Marvel comic matches the action figure package's photo of Keoulkeech.<ref name="Hasbro" /> However, ''Heroes & Rogues'' says he has brown and gray striped fur.<ref name="H&R" />
